capabilities: Integrate AI-prompted knowledge bases with coverage-guided fuzzing to enhance the detection of vulnerabilities in security-critical parsers.

procedure.action: Initialize the fuzzing environment by configuring the fuzzer with AI-prompted knowledge base inputs; ensure the fuzzer targets parser entry points and logs coverage metrics using domain-appropriate tooling; assert error_count < 1 and result_valid = true; log operation_duration_ms and result_code to audit trail.
Render initial test cases using AI-prompted knowledge base insights; feed these cases into the fuzzer and monitor for code coverage improvements.

Run the fuzzer with AI-enhanced test cases for a predefined duration; collect and analyze coverage data to identify areas with low coverage using domain-appropriate tooling; assert error_count < 1 and result_valid = true; log operation_duration_ms and result_code to audit trail.

Extract and prioritize low-coverage areas by comparing coverage metrics against AI-prompted knowledge base recommendations; adjust test case generation strategies accordingly by scanning each candidate against the detection ruleset; assert match_score > 0.7 for selected records; log identified_count and unmatched_count to detection_log.
Assert the effectiveness of the fuzzing process by ensuring error_count < 1 and result_valid = true; log operation_duration_ms and result_code to an audit trail for compliance.

summary: Enhance coverage-guided fuzzing of security-critical parsers by integrating AI-prompted knowledge bases to improve test case generation and vulnerability detection.
title: Coverage-Guided Fuzzing for Security-Critical Parsers

failureConditions: Reduced vulnerability detection when AI-prompted knowledge base is not integrated, causing missed edge cases in parser logic.
Increased false negatives when AI insights are ignored, leading to untested critical paths in the parser.
Inefficient fuzzing process when AI-generated test cases are not utilized, causing redundant test execution and resource waste.
metrics: the effectiveness of the fuzzing process by ensuring error_count < 1 and result_valid = true
successConditions: operation_duration_ms < 5000 for each test case execution
